name: Profound Medical Corp.
summary: Profound Medical Corp. is a commercial-stage medical device company focused on AI-powered, MRI-guided, incision-free therapies for ablation of diseased tissue. Its lead product, TULSA-PRO, uses real-time MRI, robotically-driven transurethral ultrasound, and closed-loop temperature feedback to ablate prostate tissue for cancer and BPH. Its Sonalleve system treats uterine fibroids, bone metastases, osteoid osteoma, and benign desmoid tumors. The company generates revenue from capital equipment sales and recurring one-time-use disposable devices.
